nasb.text: “All this,” said David, “the Lord made me understand in writing by His hand upon me, all the details of this pattern.”

esv.text: “All this he made clear to me in writing from the hand of the Lord, all the work to be done according to the plan.”

cnv.text: 大衛說：“以上這一切，就是一切工作的樣式，都是耶和華用手寫給我，使我明白的。”

ccb.text: 大卫说：“以上这一切都是耶和华亲手指示我的，让我明白工作的细节。”
